title: helichrysum griseum
intro: Helichrysum griseum, also known as silver paperflower, is a plant species in the daisy family, characterized by its silvery-gray leaves and white or yellow flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other compounds. The health benefits of Helichrysum griseum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum griseum can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which are often used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia.
